command_line: cd /workspace/game-2048 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p /workspace/game-2048 && cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
cd /rails/tmp/workspace/game-2048 && rm -rf ./* .[^.]* 2>/dev/null; npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm test && npm run build

cd /workspace/game-2048 && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('src/App.tsx')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace("import { BOARD_SIZE, createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from './game'","import { createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from './game'")
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('tsconfig.app.json')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace('"jsx": "react-jsx",','"jsx": "react-jsx",\n    "types": ["vitest/globals"],')
p.write_text(text)
PY
npm run build

cd /workspace/game-2048 && sed -i "s/import { BOARD_SIZE, createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from '.\/game'/import { createInitialGame, nextGameState, type Direction, type GameState } from '.\/game'/" src/App.tsx && sed -i '/"jsx": "react-jsx",/a\    "types": ["vitest\/globals"],' tsconfig.app.json && npm run build
